allow: Bash(psql "postgresql://neondb_owner:npg_vbe9QZY1jUcg@ep-polished-feather-abvb906e-pooler.eu-west-2.aws.neon.tech/neondb?sslmode=require&channel_binding=require" -c "SELECT EXISTS\(SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name = 'premises' AND column_name = 'verification_state'\) AS has_verification_state, EXISTS\(SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_name = 'premises_verification_events'\) AS has_pve_table, EXISTS\(SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_name = 'application_type_versions'\) AS has_atv_table, EXISTS\(SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name = 'applications' AND column_name = 'application_type_version_id'\) AS has_version_id_col;")
